raw_consumer_statement:
SUBJECT : Deja Vu Fraud : Citi 's Resurrection of a Paid Debt PLEASE READ THE CITIBANK CASE FILES IN SEQUENCE ( Each file is numbered and titled for clarity. Volumes build upon each other and are best understood in order. ) This is XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 167-page documented sequence detailing systemic Citi misconduct. 

The volume details how Citi resurrected my paid balance as new debt under Payment Correction, clawing back funds from a check they themselves issued. When I disputed this, they gave contradictory explanations including a false claim about why a credit was debited.
